3007.Title: Tina's Mindrealm
Content:
Void Sigil: Void Tina applies a Void Sigil to a player. When the sigil's countdown ends, it detonates, dealing high DMG over time to the current target. The player can pass the sigil to an ally nearby using a related button.

Tips: Pass the Void Sigil to another player before the countdown ends. On Hard Mode, the sigil's countdown is shorter, requiring more precise timing. In Master, the Void Sigil wipes the entire team when it detonates.

Void Corruption Recycle: Void Tina charges a powerful attack at the player bearing the Void Sigil, dealing massive DMG. The sigil is then cleansed by Tina (Original Form).

Tips: The player bearing the Void Sigil should activate their DMG Reduction Skills in time. In Chaotic Realm mode, due to the skill's overwhelming DMG, it's recommended to pass the sigil to a survival-focused class before detonation.

Reverie Megamorph: Overwhelmed by painful memories, Tina manifests a colossal Inner Demon that wields a long Lance, sweeping for massive DMG. Tina (Original Form) summons cabinets that players can interact with to teleport.

Tips: Keep an eye on Void Tina's location and find the cabinet near the tail end of the Lance. Just before the sweep lands, interact with the cabinet to teleport across and avoid the hit.

Void Corruption Clone: Void Tina splits her Void Corruption power into multiple clones and begins charging a powerful move. The clones slowly walk toward Tina and are absorbed one by one. Each absorbed clone significantly boosts the power of the move.

Tips: Prioritize defeating the clones that are closer to Tina.

Lance Flurry: Void Tina swings her long Lance, releasing shockwaves in all directions. Tina (Original Form) will dissipate 2 of the affected zones.

Tips: Pay close attention to the dissipated zones to avoid taking DMG. In Chaotic Realm mode, Void Tina unleashes multiple waves of attacks-observe the pattern and dodge accordingly.

3008.Title: Towering Ruin
Content: Use dimensional switch to access unreachable areas. Master this ability to gradually uncover the secrets of the tower.

4002.Title: Tina's Mindrealm - Master
Content:
Protect Tina: The Kanamia souls from Tina's memories drain her sanity. Defeat the monsters as quickly as possible.

Tips: Focus on eliminating monsters with Void Engram first, as they inflict the greatest sanity loss on Tina.

Rescue Troopers: Save the injured troopers on the battlefield while avoiding periodic bombardments from massive war machines.
Tips: If targeted, keep moving and stay away from the injured troopers to avoid taking DMG.

4004.Title: Towering Ruin - Master
Content: Dimensional Duality: Defeat incoming [Disruptor] robots in the Reality Dimension!
Interrupt Repair: Enter the Imagination Dimension and defeat the [Repairers] restoring the [Disruptors]!

4005.Title: Towering Ruin - Kartgriff
Content:
Dimensional Banishment: Kartgriff banishes all players except the target into the Imagination Dimension. Banished players must defeat dimensional monsters, collect energy, and open a Dimensional Rift to escape. Players in the Imagination Dimension will suffer continuous HP loss.
Equip skills that can pull enemies together for more efficient clears. On Hard mode and above, the center area will emit waves of corrosive Engram Orbs, inflicting healing block on anyone they contact.

Dimensional Rift: After collecting enough energy in the Imagination Dimension, interact with the rift to escape. In Chaotic Realm mode, there are 4 rifts-only one leads to the correct exit.

Tips: The correct exit is visible from the Reality Dimension. Players in the Reality Dimension must guide those in the Imagination Dimension to the right rift once it appears.

Dimensional Collapse: After the rifts crack, Kartgriff deals high DMG over time to all players. A protective shield will form at the correct rift, greatly reducing incoming DMG.

Tips: Players in both the Reality Dimension and Imagination Dimension must assemble before escaping, or they'll suffer massive DMG. Healers should focus on group healing during this phase.

Sky Crack: Kartgriff charges an Electromagnetic Core and summons charging lasers to empower it. If the laser hits the core, it triggers massive DMG across the whole battlefield. If it hits a player, it stacks Electromagnetic Vulnerability, increasing the DMG they take.

Tips: Players should take turns intercepting the laser to prevent it from hitting the core. Healers must restore intercepted players' HP. On Hard mode and above, an electromagnetic zone continuously Opens at the center-dodge accordingly.

Charged Laser: Kartgriff releases a massive energy blast from his core, dealing massive DMG to the target.

Tips: Survival-focused classes should use DMG Reduction Skills, while all others should keep their distance.

4006.Title: Kanamia Trial - Maximo
Content:
Soul Split: The Soul Pool launches a soul attack at all players, dealing DMG and leaving behind their souls on the ground.

Tips: Spread out the souls to avoid overlapping Soul Fissures. On Hard mode and above, more players are attacked by the souls.

Soul Obliteration: The Soul Pool obliterates all souls, creating Soul Fissures at their locations. These fissures exert a gravitational pull and will annihilate any player who touches them.

Tips: Before Soul Obliteration, move to positions where gravitational pulls from multiple fissures are balanced. On Hard mode and above, Engram Orbs will spawn from the fissures and shoot outward. Dodge them carefully.

Earth Breaker: Targets a random player and channels a fiery slash that creates a fan-shaped DMG zone.

Tips: The targeted player should move away from allies. On Hard mode and above, fire zones may linger-keep them clear of Soul Fissures.

Soul Pool Ritual: Maximo and his two partners summon soul weapons and pray for the Soul Pool's blessing. During this time, the Soul Pool fires continuous soul barrages at players. Players must defeat all three soul weapons.

Tips: Split your team to attack all soul weapons. Coordinate DMG output to keep their HP balanced and defeat them around the same time to prevent regeneration.

4007.Title: Kanamia Trial
Content:
Rescue Necalli: Destroy the energy shield restraining Necalli and stop the surrounding Engram Orbs from recharging it.

Tips: DMG-focused classes should concentrate on breaking the shield, while survivor-focused and support classes intercept the Engram Orbs.

Collect Engram: Escort Necalli to collect energy from 3 Engram locations in the area.

Tips: Healers are best suited for escorting, while other classes should focus on clearing monsters.

Catch Boarlet: Chase down the Boarlet until they run out of energy, and catch as many as you can.

Tips: Keep an eye on your Stamina and avoid straying too far from the Boarlet.

4009.Title: Dragon Claw Valley - Master
Content:
Wind Chasing Shadow: Attack Wind-Powered Boarlet to make it drop Energy Particles and collect them promptly. During the clone phase, quickly identify the real Boarlet.
Tips: Use Resilience-breaking skills to destroy the Boarlet's Resilience gauge, and the Boarlet will drop a large number of particles!

4010.Title: Goblin Lair - Shuro Barot
Content:
Military Formation: Goblins are summoned to form battle lines. After a few seconds, they charge at players. Among them, two Goblin Swordmen carry Wind Shields, which drop upon defeat.

Tips: Look for the goblins with Wind Shields and take them down separately. Then, stand in the gaps of the charging formation to avoid taking DMG. On Hard mode and above, goblins charge in double rows. Watch carefully for safe spots to dodge the charge.

Spark of the Storm: Shuro Barot summons a Storm Domain and condenses a Storm Core, launching it toward players. Players holding a Wind Shield can tap the extra skill button to deflect the core. If the Storm Core hits Shuro Barot, it interrupts his casting. If it hits the Storm Domain, it triggers area damage across the whole battlefield.

Tips: Stand in the Storm Core's path early to deflect it. Multiple players can work together to coordinate the bounces. On Hard mode and above, Shuro Barot also summons a Storm Barrier-players must bounce the core multiple times to let it bypass the barrier.

Thunder Formation: Shuro Barot channels thunderous power to unleash multiple consecutive fan-shaped attacks.

Tips: Stay near the pre-indicated zones and dodge according to the attack pattern.

4011.Title: Dragon Claw Valley - Igoreus
Content:
Wind Spirit Summon: Igoreus summons Wind Spirits and later absorbs them to enhance himself. Killing Wind Spirits generates Wind Spirit Energy. Players who collect this energy will gain increased ATK but reduced defense.
Tips: Quickly kill Wind Spirits after they spawn. On Hard Mode, their death deals massive DMG to the players, so take turns to kill them promptly. Plan how many energy pickups each player gets to avoid severe defense loss.

Lightning Storm: Igoreus absorbs all Wind Spirits and Wind Spirit Energy on the field to form a shield and begins a wide-range lightning bombardment. Breaking the shield will interrupt the cast and render Igoreus Vulnerable. The faster the shield is broken, the longer the Vulnerable duration.
Tips: Save burst skills for quickly breaking the shield. Leave Wind Spirit Energy on the field and collect it right before this skill for more ATK.

Howling Gale: Igoreus summons strong horizontal winds and flies into the storm, searching for a chance to sweep across the field from above, dealing massive DMG to players on half of the field.
Tips: Push against the wind and watch the enemy's position. Igoreus's wings glow on the side he will swoop from.
Floating Island Battle: Igoreus flees to the Floating Island to recover HP. Players must use floating ability to hunt the enemy down.

Wind Spirit Ore: The Floating Island is filled with Wind Spirit-infused ore. Use the enemy's Thunder Rage Strike to shatter the ore and release Wind Spirit Energy.
Tips: Tanks must lure the enemy to an island with Wind Spirit Ore. On Hard+ mode, Wind Spirit Ore may emit Thunder Corrosion Energy, which lowers player DEF upon pickup. Players should prioritize picking up Thunder Corrosion Energy.

4012.Title: Goblin Lair - Master
Content:
Lair Cleanup: Step on and eliminate small Arachnocrabs in the lair to rapidly speed up your cleanup!
Tips: Stepping on venomous Arachnocrabs gives major progress boosts! However, players will be poisoned and continuously lose HP. Use Goblin Mage's blessing to quickly eliminate the venomous!

4016.Title: Dark Mist Fortress - Void Corruption
Content: Void Corruption: Inside the Dark Mist Fortress, players are continuously affected by Void Corruption, accumulating Void Corruption stacks. Upon reaching 100 stacks, players will lose sanity and die.</style>

4017.Title: Dark Mist Fortress - Anti-Gravity Ring
Content:
Low Gravity Zone: When the Anti-Gravity Ring left in the Dark Mist Fortress is activated, it creates a small low-gravity zone.
Tips: Double-jumping within the low-gravity zone allows players to navigate between floors.

4013.Title: Dark Mist Fortress - Multiplayer Dungeon
Content:
Void Corruption Infliction: Within the Dark Mist Fortress, players are continuously afflicted by Void Corruption. As Void Corruption accumulates, reaching 100 stacks will result in loss of sanity and death.
Tips: Players with high Void Corruption should group up at the gravity device to purge the Void Corruption.

Low Gravity Zone: When the Divine Ruins left in the Dark Mist Fortress are activated, they generate a small low-gravity zone.
Tips: Double-jumping within the low-gravity zone allows players to navigate between floors.

4014.Title: Dark Mist Fortress I - Master
Content:
Destroy the Corrupted Source: Defeat the phase-shifting Corrupted Source.
Tips: The corrupted source is swiftly located following its phase shift, and interrupt skills are employed to halt the activation of its Annihilation Pulse, thereby preventing sustained heavy DMG.

Recover Imagine Fragments: Recover as many Imagine Fragments as possible in low-gravity conditions.
Tips: Pay attention to team route assignments to complete objectives more efficiently.

4015.Title: Dark Mist Fortress - Denvel
Content:
Void Corruption Imprint Denvel channels the Void Corruption Power to imprint a player. The imprinted player takes DMG and leaves behind a permanent Void Corruption Rift at their feet.
Tips: Imprinted players should move to the edge of the arena to prevent the Void Corruption Rift from affecting the party.

Void Corruption: Cleave: Denvel channels the Void Corruption Power to conjure a blade and, after a brief charge-up, cleaves down with it. Hruga's Power aids in launching Void Corruption Shards toward the center of the arena. If the cleave lands, it results in total annihilation.
Tips: Tank players must interact at the center, then continuously tap the acquired skill to raise a shield, protecting other players from Void Corruption Shards while also guiding Imagine Shards to the hit players to cleanse Void Corruption.

Void Corruption Barrier: Denvel gathers Void Corruption Power and raises a barrier on the field. Crossing the barrier triggers a burst of Void Corruption Ripples that deals DMG to all players and accumulate significant Void Corruption.
Tips: Players should group up and cross the barrier together to avoid taking repeated DMG.

Void Corruption Decay: Denvel channels Void Corruption Power to mark two players. After a short delay, Void Corruption Decay erupts from them, dealing DMG to all players (the farther from the eruption, the less the DMG taken).
Tips: Marked players should move to opposite corners of the field, while everyone else should group at the center to minimize the decay DMG.

Void Corruption: The End: Denvel is fully Void and unleashes a devastating wave of Void Corruption Power across the field.
Tips: Players must interact with Imagine Shards to bring Denvel down and defeat him within the time limit. Tank players must lead Hruga's puppet away to keep Void Corruption from spreading to the party. Healers should tend to Lingering Souls scattered across the field to cleanse Void Corruption from the party.

4019.Title: Wraith Shrine - Shadow Bladedancer
Content:
Dagger of Execution: The Shadow Bladedancer targets a player and summons Dagger of Execution that strikes after a delay, executing the target and dealing DMG in a small area. The marked player must use the Soul Totem to gain Life Shelter to survive.
Tips: Marked players must reach a Soul Totem quickly.

Totems: A Soul Totem becomes a Wraith Totem after activation, opening a Gate of Wraith.
Tips: Plan the totem placement carefully.

Gate of Wraith: Wraiths emerge and move toward Shadow Bladedancer, who absorbs them to recover HP and boosts ATK.
Tips: Focus down the wraiths immediately.

Undead Revival: The Shadow Bladedancer summons Lost Wraiths. Players must touch and escort each wraith to a Soul Totem to purify it. When the timer expires, DMG is dealt based on the number of wraiths purified.
Tips: Avoid crossing teammates' escort paths. Otherwise, the wraith falls back to Lost state.

Shackles of Souls: The Shadow Bladedancer binds the soul of a targeted player and summons a Dagger of Execution that descends slowly. Failure to break the chain in time results in massive decay DMG.
Tips: Beware of detonating Wraith Totems near teammates.

4021.Title: Depths of Decay - Forgotten Nightmare
Content:
Disorientation: Players enter Illusory State where telegraphs and actual DMG zones are inverted.
Tips: If afflicted, move into the telegraphed area to avoid the reversed attack.

Haunting Nightmare: Tethers multiple players, dealing DMG over time and inflicting stackable Healing Reduction. Players can move apart to break the tether, but it triggers a large explosion and inflicts Neverending Nightmares on all players. While this effect lasts, any subsequent tether break deals massively increased explosion DMG.
Tips: Break tethers one by one after the previous player's vulnerability ends.

Inner Demon Summon Summons a ring of Inner Demons around the arena. Some will mimic the Nightmare's skills. When players are in Illusory State, Inner Demon casts will also appear reversed.
Tips: Watch the Nightmare's telegraphs and, depending on your Illusory State, identify which Inner Demon is mimicking the skill. Use this to locate the safe zones.

Wayward Dream - Finding the Dream Spirit The Nightmare pulls all players into its dreamscape. Study the Dream Spirits around you and find the one whose rune and vortex markings differ from the Nightmare's. Destroying the correct spirit is the only way forward. Inside the dreamscape, players remain in Illusory State and can only see nearby allies.
Tips: Compare the rune above the Nightmare and the swirling vortex around it, then look for a Dream Spirit with both traits completely opposite. Avoid the reversed attacks along the way.

Wayward Dream - Breaking the Barrier Destroying the correct Dream Spirit links it to nearby players, causing it to follow them. While linked, both players and the spirit are heavily slowed, with the movement penalty shared by everyone inside the circle.
Tips: Linked players must guide the spirit toward the barrier's fracture point, while the rest of the party stands inside the circle to help shoulder the slow effect.

4023.Title: Rock Serpent Lair - Akufis
Content:
Akufis feeds on subterranean crystals and strengthens itself as it absorbs them.
Tips: Once Akufis absorbs enough crystal, it summons Serpent Eggs to aid it.

Corrosive Venom: Use Akufis's skill to destroy the Serpent Eggs before they hatch.
Tips: Destroying the eggs triggers large AoE DMG. Too many destroyed at once can wipe out the entire team.

Serpent Hatchling Shield: Newly hatched serpents are protected by an invincible shield.
Tips: Use explosive barrels to break their shields.

Burrow: Akufis burrows underground, repeatedly unleashing AoE attacks.
Tips: Use explosive barrels to force it back to the surface; higher difficulties require more blasts.

Death Wail: Akufis charges up and deals persistent arena-wide DMG.
Tips: Serpents sharing the crystal's color gain immunity shields during this skill. Kill them to steal the shield.

Energy Drain: Akufis channels energy from all serpents on the field. Once the drain completes, it deals DMG to the entire party, plus extra hits for each unit of energy absorbed.
Tips: Stand between Akufis and the serpents to interrupt the energy flow.

4024.Title: Illusory Moonveil Wilds - Plague Nappo
Content:
Piercing Arrow: Plague Nappo conjures a spectral bow and fires a devastating shot. The DMG dealt to the target is mirrored to the entire party.
Tips: The targeted player should use DMG Reduction to protect the group.

Guess Where I Am: Plague Nappo splits into five identical illusions, all channeling a lethal spell. Attacking the wrong clone results in punishment.
Tips: Track the real body by following the footprints on the ground, then interrupt the cast.

Hide-and-Seek: Plague Nappo creates multiple clones and transforms both clones and players into hide-and-seek objects around the field. At the end of the skill duration, Plague Nappo will attack all adventurers standing in the wrong positions, and its clones will also appear to attack adventurers.
Tips: Adventurers must ensure that objects in the scene (adventurers and clones) are placed in the correct positions: Follow the prompt to check the field objects and find the position you should be in (your ground marker turns green at the correct position). Defeat the incorrectly positioned Plague Nappo clones at the same time.

Hide-and-Seek: Incorrectly positioned Nappo clones will fixate on random targets and pursue them continuously.
Tips: Attack the targets that are not fixating on you to help teammates escape danger.

4027.Title: Devourer Cage
Content:
Lightless Realm: The Light Devourer covers the field in darkness. Adventurers lose HP continuously in the darkness, and the damage dealt is greatly reduced.
Tips: Adventurers must avoid staying in the darkness. Seek a Light Domain to dispel the darkness, fighting the boss within the Light Domain.

Light Domain: The light orbs left on the field can recharge the Light Domain, allowing it to expand its domain. Adventurers inside the Light Domain are immune to the darkness effect. The Light Domain loses Light Energy when attacked by the Light Devourer. If all Light Energy is depleted, it collapses into darkness.
Tips: Keep an eye on the Light Domain info on the left. When Light Energy becomes low, collect light orbs on the field and carry them close to the Light Domain to recharge it. Tank roles must position the Light Domain properly based on where the light orbs appear.

4028.Title: Devourer Cage - Light Devourer
Content:
Dark Rifts: The Light Devourer uses Dark Rifts on the field to attack adventurers. Dark Rifts mimic some of the Light Devourer's skills. Make sure to carefully position yourself and your teammates.
Tips: When a Rift is present, place the Light Domain wisely to avoid situations where both the Light Devourer and the Rift release overlapping skills that block movement. During transition phases, choose your starting position based on Rift locations and combat flow to avoid being trapped.

Dark Pulse: The Light Devourer will lock on the Light Domain and, after a delay, repeatedly unleash Dark Pulse, greatly draining its Light Energy. If Dark Rifts are present, they also mimic the Light Devourer, locking on the Light Domain and unleashing Dark Pulse.
Tips: A damage warning zone appears when the Light Devourer unleashes Dark Pulse. An adventurer must quickly pick up the Light Domain and reposition it to safety before Dark Pulse hits. When moving the Light Domain, always watch teammate positions to avoid plunging them into darkness.

Frenzied Darkness: The Light Devourer enters a special state, gains a shield, and continuously casts skills, dealing damage to all adventurers until the shield is broken.
Tips: Monitor the Light Devourer's skill timing and keep your burst skills ready. Once the shield comes up, fire off burst and shatter it as quickly as possible.

4029.Title: Soundless City - Ancient Purifier
Content:
Stasis Zone: There are several Stasis Zones in the combat area. Any adventurer, monster, or attack within a Stasis Zone has reduced Movement Speed and Attack SPD.
Tips: Tanks should lure the boss into a Stasis Zone to weaken some of its attacks, while other adventurers stay outside the Stasis Zone. Stasis Zones also alter the launch speed of Pulse Fountains and can be used to handle other skill mechanics.

Malice Combo: The Purifier teleports to the field and marks its current aggro target. After a delay, it will charge that adventurer. Once the charge ends, the Purifier immediately marks two adventurers. After a delay, bombardments fall on the marked players.
Tips: Everyone must stack together to share the damage when the boss charges. Afterward, the players marked for bombardment must immediately enter a Stasis Zone to mitigate the damage.

Pulse Fountain: The Purifier marks several adventurers. After a delay, a Pulse Fountain appears at the marked players' locations. Pulse Fountains trigger when stepped on, launching the adventurer into the air. Each Pulse Fountain can only be triggered once.
Tips: When marked, adventurers should move to a suitable spot in advance and immediately leave the location once the fountain spawns.

Purification Burst: The Purifier marks several adventurers with Purification Energy. It explodes after a delay, dealing heavy damage to the target's current plane.
Tips: Place some Pulse Fountains inside Stasis Zones in advance to slow down the Pulse Fountains. When Purification Energy is about to explode, use the fountains to reach different heights, preventing multiple Purification Energies from detonating on the same height level.

Omen of Destruction: The Purifier teleports to the center and destroys all Stasis Zones, then fires 5 Energy Swords into the sky. After charging for a while, it launches all adventurers into the air.
Tips: After being launched into the air, use your Floating ability to collect scattered Bapharian Legacy Energy and form a massive aerial Stasis Zone to intercept the falling Energy Swords.

4041.Title: Cursed Radiant Tomb - Divine Punisher
Content:
Matrix Protocol: Matrix Towers are summoned into the field in batches. Once a Matrix Tower's progress bar is full, its charging is complete. When three fully charged blue Matrix Towers are connected in a line, the team-wiping Divine Retribution Protocol is triggered.
Tips: Carefully guide the Disintegration Beam to convert blue Matrix Towers into gold ones. When three golden Matrix Towers are connected in a line, the boss will be forced into a Protocol Collapse state.

Polarized Judgment: Three heavy-duty tripod robots appear on the field. An Ion Blade randomly spawns on either the left or right side of each robot. After a few seconds, they charge forward, dealing massive AoE damage to the side of the field corresponding to the Ion Blade.
Tips: Identify the position of the robots' Ion Blades to determine which side is the safe zone. The overlapping safe zone of all three robots is where players can avoid damage. Move there promptly to dodge the attack.

Matrix Towers: Matrix Towers that appear on the field initially exist in an ethereal form while slowly accumulating a progress bar. After 40s, they materialize into physical Matrix Towers, indicating that charging is complete. At that moment, they will deal AoE damage.
Tips: Two Matrix Towers will complete charging simultaneously. Pay attention to positioning and avoid standing at the intersection of the two large AoE damage zones.

4042.Title: Mechanized Processing Facility - Thanatos - Final Form
Content:
Uncontrolled Roar: Thanatos - Final Form overheats and loses control, triggering a thermal reaction across the field and causing periodic steam leaks.
Tips: Locate the minecarts on both sides of the field and use the Crimson Crystals inside them to block the leaking steam vents.

Uncontrolled Roar: Thanatos - Final Form overheats and loses control, triggering a thermal reaction across the field. After a period of time, a fire tornado will appear.
Tips: The fire tornado periodically releases energy. If the energy comes into contact with Crimson Crystals or steam, it will trigger an explosive reaction. Prevent the energy from making contact.

Overheated: In the Uncontrolled Roar state, Thanatos - Final Form gains an ATK boost. When Thanatos - Final Form enters steam, it will continuously release thermal shocks before entering a CD state, removing one stack of the ATK boost.
Tips: Monitor Thanatos - Final Form's ATK boost stacks and lure it into the steam at the right time.

Overdrive Bombardment: Thanatos - Final Form enters a charging state and launches an artillery strike after a period of time. Use the cannons in the arena to defeat Thanatos - Final Form.
Tips: Destroy the charging turrets and guide them to a designated location. Turrets will prioritize following healers within their range. When the monsters summoned by Thanatos - Final Form are defeated, they drop electrical energy. Use the energy to charge available cannons to fight against Thanatos - Final Form.

Predation: Thanatos - Final Form unleashes a fierce flurry of attacks in a short period. Pay attention to the indicator above targeted players' heads to prepare for the next mechanic.
Tips: Targeted players should observe the marker icon's shape and evade the subsequent circular or ring-shaped AoE attacks accordingly.

Predation: Thanatos - Final Form unleashes a fierce flurry of attacks in a short period. Pay attention to Thanatos - Final Form's position and use Phantom Dash to respond.
Tips: Save Phantom Dash to counter Thanatos - Final Form's actions. Additionally, be mindful of the subsequent target mechanic and group up or disperse at the appropriate locations.

4044.Title: Mistveil Hunting Ground - Mist-Piercing Fang
Content:
Scar: Mist-Piercing Fang uses its sharp claws, fangs, and compressed airflow to deal heavy Bleed damage to adventurers, deplete their Armor, and disable healing skills.
Tips: Adventurers must proactively take on the various debuffs applied by Mist-Piercing Fang according to their roles.

Opportunistic Pounce: The boss randomly targets an adventurer without the Scar debuff, deals damage and applies a Red Scar.
Tips: Adventurers on the field should maintain a Scar debuff that does not interfere with their role's functionality.

Mighty Bite: Mist-Piercing Fang uses wind magic to root its current aggro target and leaps backward. It then targets the nearest adventurer in front of it, deals damage, and applies a Blue Scar.
Tips: Non-Guardian adventurers must stand in front of Mist-Piercing Fang to prevent Guardian adventurers from having their armor broken.

Crush Cyclone: Mist-Piercing Fang targets a healer adventurer, spawning several tornadoes at their feet. If the tornadoes are not removed within a certain period, a Green Scar will be applied to all adventurers.
Tips: DPS adventurers should actively contact the tornadoes to remove them, gaining a Green Scar in the process.

Hunt: Mist-Piercing Fang randomly targets an adventurer and turns invisible, becoming untargetable and immune to attacks while using wind magic to apply a shield to itself. After a short period, it leaps in front of an adventurer to instantly kill them, then repeats this behavior.
Tips: If the targeted adventurer is near the Tree of Healing, Mist-Piercing Fang's attack will be interrupted, leaving it staggered and consuming the tree's charge. At this point, adventurers can attack Mist-Piercing Fang. This skill ends when Mist-Piercing Fang's shield is broken.

Tree of Healing: It has a charged and an uncharged state. When an adventurer interacts with it, all Scars on adventurers within its range are removed, and the tree enters its uncharged state.
Tips: When the Tree of Healing enters the uncharged state, it will recharge after 60s.

4045.Title: Void - Towering Ruin - Kartgriff
Content:
Illusory Bloom Corruption: Three Illusory Bloom Cocoons are present in the arena. They tether to and charge Kartgriff's Remnant, increasing its Corruption level. The higher the Corruption level, the greater Kartgriff's Remnant's DMG Reduction. Break the Illusory Blooms to return to the real dimension and suppress Corruption through mechanics.
Tips: Coordinate interrupt skills to stop the charging and reduce Corruption gain. When the Corruption value reaches a certain threshold, break the Illusory Bloom to enter the real dimension and suppress Corruption.

Seed of Imprisonment: The Illusory Bloom Cocoon randomly spawns four blooming Illusory Blooms around itself. The Illusory Blooms last for 30s, and touching them inflicts a root effect. In Master Mode, naturally dissipating Illusory Blooms will leave behind a Corruption Zone.
Tips: During non-essential mechanic phases in combat, split up to step on the Illusory Blooms and purify them. Purify them promptly to avoid impacting core mechanics.

Sky Crack - Reverse: Kartgriff charges an Electromagnetic Core and summons charging lasers to empower it. If a laser hits the core, it gains charge. Charging reduces Corruption and Kartgriff's HP in the Lunalusion dimension. Lasers hitting players deal damage; in Master Mode, they also apply Electromagnetic Vulnerability stacks. Illusory Bloom Cocoons attempt to interfere with the charging by constantly summoning Illusory Blooms in the arena. Lasers hitting an Illusory Bloom destroy it, dealing AoE damage and stacking Corruption.
Tips: Block the laser path appropriately to clear the Illusory Blooms on one side, then allow the laser on the other side to fully charge the core.

Dimensional Banishment - Reverse: Players return to the real dimension by breaking the Illusory Blooms. Monsters corrupted by the Illusory Blooms continuously unleash AoE damage to prevent Kartgriff's recovery.
Tips: DPS players should break the enemy monsters' toughness gauges, while healers should take the opportunity to continuously heal allied monsters. Pick up Engram Orbs to suppress Corruption.

Momentary Rift: Players return to the real dimension by breaking the Illusory Blooms. In the real dimension, there are four portals, categorized as either real or Lunalusion. The Lunalusion portals visible to each player differ, and only the overlapping portals are the correct ones. During this period, Corruption continuously increases, and players constantly take damage.
Tips: First, gather at one portal and observe the number of players, then move to another. The portal with the most players is the correct one.

4043.Title: Void - Tina's Mindrealm - Void Reverie
Content:
Void Corruption Curse: Void Tina deals damage to the entire arena and curses several cabinets. The cursed cabinets will erupt with Void Corruption after a period of time.
Tips: Interact with a cabinet before it erupts to absorb the Void Corruption. After absorbing it, allow it to detonate in a safe location.

Void Corruption Oppression: After charging for a period of time, Void Tina attacks the entire arena. Tina (Original Form) blesses several cabinets. Quickly move to the vicinity of the blessed cabinets to avoid the damage.
Tips: Move near the blessed cabinets to take cover before the charging finishes. On Hard Mode or above, this skill disables Phantom Dash, so make use of the teleportation mechanic between cabinets wisely.

Void Corruption Strike: After charging for a period of time, Void Tina sequentially attacks targets on the field in numerical order, dealing massive damage. On Master difficulty or above, each attack is followed by an extra super-wide slash to the right.
Tips: Spread out to prevent taking multiple hits. On Master difficulty or above, be careful not to stand to the right of other players to avoid taking secondary damage.

Reverie Megamorph: Overwhelmed by painful memories, Tina manifests a colossal Inner Demon that wields a long Lance, sweeping for massive DMG. Tina (Original Form) summons cabinets that players can interact with to teleport.

Tips: Keep an eye on Void Tina's location and find the cabinet near the tail end of the Lance. Just before the sweep lands, interact with the cabinet to teleport across and avoid the hit.

Void Corruption Clone: Summons a clone at the edge of the arena. After a brief delay, the clone unleashes a continuously advancing wave of Void Corruption toward the center of the arena.
Tips: Observe the clone's position, move to the cabinet opposite the clone in advance, and teleport to the other side at the right moment to avoid the damage.

Byrnhald Invasion: Recreates the scene of the Byrnhald invasion from the past within the Illusory Bloom's domain. Defeat the Byrnhald soldiers to end this illusion.
Tips: Eliminate the soldiers as quickly as possible while protecting as many civilians as you can. Each civilian's death grants Tina an ATK increase.

4046.Title: Sea-Ringed Reef - Abyssal Nappo
Content:
Dual Notes: Abyssal Nappo's elemental attacks apply two different Note marks to players. The Notes cannot coexist; when a player is hit by another elemental attack, the mark changes to the corresponding Note.
Tips: The Note marks are used to handle specific mechanics. Try to avoid situations where all players in the party share the same mark.

Brilliant Performance: Abyssal Nappo begins its unique performance. Once the cast bar is full, it unleashes a powerful strike and destroys all bubbles.
Tips: Enter the bubbles to avoid the attack during the cast.

Cold Wave Symphony: Summons stack markers of different elements. After a brief delay, bubble attacks of the corresponding elements descend. If no players are inside a stack marker, a second, arena-wide attack is triggered.
Tips: Split into two groups to share the damage. You can use this mechanic to balance the Notes within the party.

Torrent Duet: Abyssal Nappo summons speakers to unleash a large-scale wave attack. During this phase, players with the corresponding Note mark can see the danger zones. When such a player enters the safe zone, the Note above their head will flash to indicate it.
Tips: Players with the matching Note should move to the safe zone as soon as possible. Players with different Notes should watch the Notes above other players' heads to identify the safe zone's location.

Super Dance - Opening: Abyssal Nappo sways and dances, creating two-colored warning zones on the ground. After several beats, Nappo attacks one of the colored zones and grants players a shield of the opposite color.
Tips: During the Opening phase of Super Dance, leaving the spotlight area will result in massive damage. Watch the warnings and avoid the attacks, then remember the color of your shield to handle upcoming mechanics.

Super Dance - Variation: Abyssal Nappo uses Notes to cast spells, summoning clones or sonic orbs. If clones appear, players should quickly focus fire or interrupt the clone whose color is opposite to their shield. If sonic orbs appear, players must use their shield to absorb sonic orbs of the same color, preventing subsequent attacks.
Tips: Spread out in advance and quickly handle clones or sonic orbs according to your shield color.

Super Dance - Boiling Point: Abyssal Nappo can hardly suppress its excitement and begins casting Brilliant Performance. At this time, the speakers on the field will display random elemental beam markers.
Tips: Enter the bubbles to avoid the attack. You can adjust the bubble's direction to target the outer-ring speakers of the corresponding element. Successfully hitting them will apply a vulnerability effect to Nappo.

4200.Title: Pioneer Bureau Commission - Goblin Rampage
Content:
Attribute Orb: Goblins have a chance to drop Attribute Orbs when defeated. Picking one up grants a significant attribute boost.

Tips: Attribute Orbs are non-exclusive, meaning collecting different types will stack their effects.

4201.Title: Pioneer Bureau Commission - Defeat the Goblin Mage
Content:
Monsters will drop Revealing Stones when defeated. Activating a Revealing Stone grants the Revealing Spell.

Tips: You can store up to 10 Revealing Stones.

Casting Revealing Spell from a distance pinpoints the location of the Goblin Mage. Using it at close range reveals the Goblin Mage.

Tips: Locate the Goblin Mage's position by adjusting your distance.

4202.Title: Bureau Commission - Urgent Delivery
Content:
Transport Goods: Interact with the cargo to pick it up. Adventurers must deliver all the goods to the destination within the time limit.
Note: There are 6 piles of cargo in total.

Tips: You can carry multiple piles at once, but the more you carry, the slower you'll move and the faster your Stamina will drain. Team up and divide the load among players to transport the cargo more efficiently.
Activate Speed Pedals: Speed Pedals are placed along the delivery route. Approaching them grants a speed boost.
Obstacles Along the Way: You'll encounter many obstacles during transport. Destroy or avoid them to continue moving.

4203.Title: Bureau Commission - Light Bridge I
Content:
Light Bridge Pedal: Use Light Bridge Pedals to reach the floating platforms. Some pedals may be invisible.

Tips: Light Bridge Pedals won't disappear. Even invisible ones can be stood on. Memorize their positions to cross quickly.

Activate Platform Traps: Standing on a platform deactivates its traps and reveals all hidden Light Bridge Pedals on the connected segment. Once all players leave the platform, the bridge becomes hidden again.

Tips: In multiplayer mode, one player can stay on the platform to keep the bridges visible while others move to the next checkpoint. Once everyone has crossed, the mechanism deactivates automatically.

4204.Title: Bureau Commission - Light Bridge II
Content: Light Bridge Pedal: Adventurers must use Light Bridge Pedals to reach the floating platforms and make their way to the final destination.
Be cautious of traps along the way.

4205.Title: Bureau Commission - Demi-Human Q&A
Content:
Quiz Session: Once the quiz begins, adventurers will face 2 rounds of questions. After the quiz, the battle round will commence.

Tips: Answering correctly grants attribute boosts to all adventurers. Giving incorrect answers will empower the monsters.
Battle Session: Adventurers must fight the demi-human Boss. Defeat the Boss to complete the commission.

4206.Title: Bureau Commission - Boars Run
Content: Boars Run: When adventurers approach Boars, they will run away. Once they run out of Stamina, they'll collapse and start to recover Stamina rapidly-catch them before they get back up!

Special Boars: Two types of special Boars can also be found in the pen. Catching them grants extra score.
Boar: Charges at nearby adventurers.
Rare Boar: Grants a large amount of points when caught.

4207.Title: Bureau Commission - Suppress the Eruption
Content: Activate Robot: Adventurers must collect Engram Orbs and approach the robot to charge it. <style="GuideBookLab1">The robot will begin moving once it has enough energy.</style>
Robot Acceleration: Adventurers gain an acceleration skill. <style="GuideBookLab1">Using the acceleration skill boosts the robot Speed but consumes twice the energy</style>.

4208.Title: Bureau Commission - Spider Dodge
Content: Self-Destruct Robot: Adventurers must avoid self-destruct robots that charge in from all directions. Touching one triggers an explosion and causes damage.

4209.Title: Bureau Commission - Sky Trial
Content: Gliding Trial: Use your gliding ability to pass through all target rings and reach the finish line.

4301.Title: Monster Hunt - Elite
Content: Select a target from the Elite tab in the Monster Hunt interface to track it. Each time you defeat an Elite, you'll earn EXP and Season Points, and there is a chance to obtain various monster materials and Luno.

Note: Only the first player or team to deal DMG to an Elite monster will have the right to open the Loot dropped by the target. For them, the target's HP bar appears red, while it appears gray to others.
Loots dropped by Elites can be opened using Elite Loot Keys to claim rewards.

4302.Title: Monster Hunt - Boss
Content: Track the target through the Boss tab in the Monster Hunt interface. Each time you defeat a Boss, you will gain EXP and season points, and there is a chance to obtain various monster materials, Luno, and gear.
After each Boss defeat, you will receive a one-time reward, which can be previewed in the Reward Preview section.
Dropped Loots can be opened by anyone who dealt DMG to the boss, healed other players, or took DMG from the boss. Use the Boss Loot Key to open them and claim your rewards.

4401.Title: Leisure Activity - Ancient City Patrol
Content:
Join the Asterleeds Troopers in their scheduled raids to clear goblins in the Ancient City of Vill. The troopers will move along the route shown above.
Tips: The Asterleeds Troopers will clear monsters along the path. After reaching their destination, they will rest for 3 minutes before retreating. Adventurers must follow them to earn event points.

4402.Title: Leisure Activity - Brigand Camp Patrol
Content:
Join the Asterleeds Troopers in their scheduled raids to clear Brigands at the Brigand camp. The troopers will move along the route shown above.

Tips: Asterleeds Troopers will clear monsters along the path. After reaching their destination, they will rest for 3 minutes before retreating. Adventurers must follow them to earn event points.

4403.Title: Leisure Activity - Muku Camp Patrol
Content:
Join Kanamia warriors in scheduled raids to clear Mukus at the Muku camp. Troopers will follow the route shown above.
Tips: Kanamia warriors will clear monsters along the path. After reaching their destination, they will rest for 3 minutes before retreating. Adventurers must follow them to earn event points.

4404.Title: Leisure Activity – Parade! Charming Fish
Content: The leader will move along the route shown above. After the event begins, an interactive marker indicating the path will appear at the starting point. Follow the route to find the parade.

4405.Title: Leisure Activity – Boarlet Knight Parade
Content: The leader will move along the route shown above. After the event begins, an interactive marker indicating the path will appear at the starting point. Follow the route to find the parade.

4501.Title: Floating Island - Dragon Shackles - Rin·Izcorgiky
Content:
Touch of Frost: A stacking status effect under extreme cold weather. Increases DMG taken from the boss. At 20 stacks, the player becomes frozen. Allies can rescue the frozen player by breaking the ice.
Harsh Weather: There are four weather levels: Clear, Rain, Snow, and Blizzard. The stacking speed of Touch of Frost differs by weather condition.
Tips: In Snow or Blizzard weather, team members must stay close together.

Extreme Cold Weather: During Snow or Blizzard weather, if not enough players are nearby, a player will be frozen after a short time.
Tips: In Snow or Blizzard weather, team members must stay close together.

Fire Dragon Raid: The fire dragon lingers on the sides of the battlefield, spraying burning zones inward.
Tips: The burning zones can remove the Touch of Frost for players.

Drake Cannon: Turrets are positioned on both sides of the battlefield. Interact with them to fire at the fire dragon. After being hit 3 times, the fire dragon will be knocked down. Turrets cannot be used when in a burning or frozen state.
Tips: Coordinate attacks on the fire dragon and use skills wisely to recover turrets from frozen/burning states.

Endless Winter: The boss flies to a distant floating island, leaving behind a frozen bridge. At the end of the bridge are two Frozen Lances. Break both simultaneously to destroy the ice wall.
Tips: Send two groups along both paths and synchronize the lance destruction. Stay close together to avoid freezing.

Gunpowder Bucket: Ignite and explode shortly after being destroyed, dealing DMG.
Tips: Use Gunpowder Buckets wisely to dispel Touch of Frost.

Frost Smash: Deals lethal DMG in a frontal area. If no player is present, triggers a large AoE attack.
Tips: Tanks should activate DMG reduction skills to absorb the hit.

Zero-Degree Snowfield: Targets a player with shared DMG and summons the Zero-Degree Snowfield. All players are linked to the snowfield core and continuously gain Touch of Frost stacks. Breaking the link deals DMG.
Tips: Quickly exit the area and group together to minimize the effect.

4502.Title: Floating Island - Dragon Shackles - Bone·Xiolotl
Content:
Sealed Void Dragon: Most of Xiolotl's power has been sealed by the Divine. As the battle progresses, Xiolotl will gradually lift the seal and regain its power.
Tips: When the boss unseals a body part, it immediately unleashes that part's ability. Follow the prompts and react accordingly.

Sealed Abilities: When Xiolotl's wing seal is lifted, it releases a spinning aerial breath attack.
Tips: Run in the direction of the breath's spin. On Hard mode, Void Corruption Waves accompany the breath. Jump to avoid them.

Void Corruption Afterimage: Xiolotl summons two Void Corruption Afterimages that lock onto two players. After a delay, they charge at their targets. All players along their path share the DMG.
Tips: Others should quickly move into the line to help share the DMG. On higher difficulties, Void Corruption Afterimages are enhanced. Any single player hit twice by the Void Corruption Afterimages will be instantly killed.

Void Engram Spray: Xiolotl marks several players with Void Engram. After a delay, the Void Engram unleashes wide-area DMG in a designated direction.
Tips: Marked players must quickly reposition to ensure no Allies are within their warning zone. On Hard mode, two players are marked, on Nightmare, three.

Void Corruption Banishment: Xiolotl briefly opens a portal to the sealed interior.
Tips: Standing in the portal transports you inside, where you can find a way to dispel the field-clearing seal. On Nightmare mode, the seal is reinforced and the same player cannot enter twice in a row.

Inside the Seal: The divine seal's interior is extremely unstable. Players are expelled after a short time, so leave quickly.
Tips: The key to resolving the mechanic is a divine construct carrying a rune on its head. Defeat it and exit with the rune. On Nightmare mode, the seal guardian's power is strengthened.

Divine Seal: A force used to suppress the Void Dragon. When anomalies are detected, it purges the field.
Tips: The runes inside the seal change frequently. Pay close attention.

Divine Seal Emergency Mode: When the seal detects anomalies, it fires light walls across the battlefield to purge threats.
Tips: Enter the seal and retrieve a rune, then use its power to create a shield and block the light wall. Only shields of matching energy types will work. Observe carefully before use.

4503.Title: Floating Island - Dragon Shackles - Light·Tonatiuh
Content:
Void Dual Pact: Marks two players. After a short time, deals DMG and generates Spacetime Crystals at their current locations.
Tips: The two players must place the crystals in the center and at the edge of the arena to counter upcoming boss mechanics.

Spacetime Field: Interact with the Spacetime Crystal to transform it into a Spacetime Field. Players inside are immune to projectiles and takes significantly less DMG.
Tips: When the boss unleashes Spacetime Blitz, follow the prompt to activate the crystal and stand in the field. On Hard+ mode, the interacting player will also leave behind a Void Collapse Zone. After dodging the DMG, relocate the zone to the edge of the battlefield.

Spacetime Rift: Interact with a rift to teleport between two locations.
Tips: On Nightmare mode, the interacting player generates Light Erosion Sigils. Players must immediately spread out.

Purifying Light: Tonatiuh summons a one-hit-kill purifying light wall that expands or contracts at a fixed speed.
Tips: Use the rift at the right moment to evade the light wall. On Nightmare mode, the boss summons linked light walls, and players must teleport multiple times.

Spacetime Collapse: Targets the current aggro holder and annihilates their space, dealing massive DMG, drastically lowering aggro, and inflicting a long Vulnerable status.
Tips: The marked player must immediately activate DMG Reduction skills, and another tank should step in to take over. On Nightmare mode, nearby players are pulled in after the collapse. Watch for combo attacks from the boss.

End of Spacetime: Tonatiuh charges up and freezes time, releasing a decaying AoE explosion that knocks all players back. Tonatiuh then absorbs the Radiant and Dark Crystals on both sides to prepare a devastating move.
Tips: Players must split into two groups under the side islands and use the explosion to leap onto them.

Radiant and Dark Crystals: The Radiant and Dark Crystals continuously feed energy to the boss. Both must be defeated simultaneously or they will regenerate. Breaking the crystals interrupts the boss's charge.
Tips: On Hard+ mode, crystals have shields. Breaking them inflicts a matching elemental Vulnerable debuff to the players on the islands and spawns a rift. Both teams must coordinate to destroy the crystal shields and rotate groups to avoid stacking debuffs.

Radiant Seed: Summon multiple Radiant Seeds that explode after a short time, instantly killing players within range. Players must move the Radiant Seeds.
Tips: Use rifts to move the Radiant Seeds quickly and clear space for Allies.

4504.Title: Dreambloom Ruins - Caprahorn - Bloom & Steel
Content:
Territory Awareness: When King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike are within each other's territory, they deal damage to the opposing territory.
Tips: The two tanks should position King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike within their respective areas.

Territory Defense: King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike will each mark a territory and deal heavy damage. If no player absorbs the damage, the territory will : Dealing heavy damage over time until the battle ends.
Tips: Tanks should respond to the alert and move to the designated territories to absorb the damage.

Territory Banish: King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike each summons an orb within their own territory, along with corresponding interactable orbs on the battlefield. After 10 seconds, the orbs summoned by the bosses unleash heavy AoE damage in the direction of the interactable target orbs.
Tips: Two players shall interact with the target orbs and pull them to the sides of the battlefield to prevent damage to the party.

Judgment Hour: King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike enter a duel of judgment. Each leaps back to their own territory before charging at the other. During this time, players can cast their vote for the king they support by standing in the corresponding territory. The king with the majority of votes will deal a percentage of the opponent's Max HP as damage and seize one of the opponent's territories. The king with a territory advantage gains increased Attack SPD while in their own territory.
Tips: Assign each player's voting position in advance and support the king with lower HP to balance the fight.

Vow of Valor: King of Radiance - Sunfire charges a powerful attack against King of Azure - Moonstrike, dealing massive damage and global AoE damage after a delay. King of Azure - Moonstrike deploys a shield to protect itself.
Tips: Break the shield summoned by King of Azure - Moonstrike and remain inside it to avoid taking damage.

Final Decision: When either King of Radiance - Sunfire or King of Azure - Moonstrike reaches a near-death state, both kings trigger Final Decision and unite to drive out the intruders. If both kings are brought into a near-death state simultaneously within the time limit, they will be defeated.
Tips: Balance their HP and burst them down together.

4505.Title: Land Where the Illusory Bloom Sleeps Dreambloom Ruins - Withered Illusory Bloom - Nightmare Mode
Content:
Earthshatter Fist - Chain - Part 1: The Withered Illusory Bloom resonates with the elements, charging a powerful strike. Interrupting the casting of Breath of the Dead Soil prevents it from dealing devastating damage, but this will cause its energy to overflow onto nearby adventurers. Subsequently, it locks onto that player and continuously releases linear Terra attacks.
Strategy: Assign players to four positions to interrupt the monster's cast. Guide the connecting lines away from the devices to prevent Terra from hitting them.

Earthshatter Fist - Chain - Part 2: A powerful strike drastically reduces players' movement speed. The Withered Illusory Bloom then continuously attacks players and devices in the field. Moving close to a Ruin Device grants a speed boost.
Strategy: Split into groups and head to the devices to activate the speed boost and dodge the continuously falling rocks.

Earthshatter Fist - Chain - Part 3: The Stonehusk locks onto a Ruin Device, generating shareable AoE damage at its location. During this time, the device cannot be carried or moved. If all devices are successfully shared, the Withered Illusory Bloom will enter a weakened state.
Strategy: At least 3 players must participate in sharing the damage. Be aware that multiple devices may need to be shared simultaneously.

4506.Title: Dreambloom Ruins - Withered Bloomshard
Content:
Legacy Device: Divine Legacies found within the ruins that suppress Illusory Blooms' power. When resonating nearby, Engram energy binds to the adventurer, allowing the devices to be carried around. When two Legacy Devices are too close, they interfere with each other and become disabled.
Tips: Assign players to move the Legacy Devices and follow the Stonehusk to suppress the power of Illusory Blooms on it, while keeping sufficient distance between devices.

Defense System: If a Ruin Device is hit by the Stonehusk's powerful skill, it triggers a defense system that causes a massive explosion affecting all players, dealing damage over time.
Tips: Players carrying devices must maintain proper positioning to avoid attacks. Rotate protection duties if necessary. Players without protection duties should also prioritize avoiding the devices when dodging skills.

Earthshatter Fist: The Stonehusk locks onto a Legacy Device and releases a rectangular, shareable damage zone. During this time, the device cannot be moved or repositioned, and a required number of players must enter the area to soak the damage together.
Tips: At least 5 players must participate in damage soaking to prevent the device from triggering its Defense System. This attack knocks players back a considerable distance. Take advantage of the terrain wisely to block the displacement.

Shatterstone Storm: The Stonehusk spins rapidly, unleashing sandstorm shockwaves that continuously push nearby players away. During this phase, players may gather near a Legacy Device to activate a movement speed buff, helping resist the storm's repelling force.
Tips: Group up near a Legacy Device to trigger the speed effect and avoid being pushed off platforms in certain areas, or use terrain to stabilize positioning.

Path of Advance: Withered Bloomshard smashes through the walls and advance deeper into the ruins. The path ahead is infested with Illusory Blooms. When the Stonehusk approaches them, they detonate, dealing heavy damage and causing knockback to players.
Tips: Assign some players to move ahead and clear the Illusory Blooms along the path, while the remaining players carry the Legacy Devices to suppress the Stonehusk and continue the advance.

Valley of Final Stand: Withered Bloomshard reaches the depths of the ruins and begins casting Rock of Ruin. If the cast completes, it will deal fatal damage to all players. The boss's shield must be shattered before the cast finishes. While fighting on elevated platforms, be cautious of knockback attacks to avoid falling to your death.
Tips: Use interaction points to leap down onto the platform and burst down the boss's shield. Take advantage of stone walls for cover to avoid being launched off the high ground.

4507.Title: Dreambloom Ruins - Erosion Bloom Afterimage
Content:
Erosion Link: Scarlet Abyss grants a shield to Erosion Bloom Afterimage until its own HP drops below 1%. At that moment, both parties will enter a Resilience Break state, and Erosion Bloom Afterimage's shield disappears. If Scarlet Abyss and Erosion Bloom Afterimage stay too close to each other, they both enter an empowered state, greatly increasing their ATK.
Tips: Your team needs 2 Guardians to pull the 2 bosses to the center and the edge of the arena respectively. When they enter Resilience Break state, use burst skills to quickly reduce Erosion Bloom Afterimage's HP.

Abyssal Seal: Scarlet Abyss targets players, blinking between them and slashing each one, leaving Echoes of Erosion at every player's feet.
Tips: While spreading out, try to cluster the Echoes of Erosion together to make upcoming mechanics easier to handle.

Cinderfall Trail: The Erosion Bloom Afterimage targets 2 players, charges up, and fires flame shockwaves that erase all Echoes of Erosion along their path. When an Echo of Erosion is erased, it explodes and releases Erosion energy, inflicting a bleed-over-time debuff to all players and leaving DoT zones on the ground.
Tips: Targeted players should guide the flame to destroy as many Echoes of Erosion as possible. Healers must maintain team HP.

Inferno Ring: The Erosion Bloom Afterimage gathers internal energy and deals massive ring-shaped DMG. It then charges again, dealing heavy Fire AoE decay DMG to the entire arena and detonating all Echoes of Erosion. Echoes of Erosion detonations deal heavy raid-wide DMG, inflict bleed-over-time, and leave DoT zones.
Tips: Try to use Cinderfall Trail to clear Echoes of Erosion. If Inferno Ring will detonate them instead, pre-activate DMG Reduction skills.

Avatar of the End: Erosion Bloom Afterimage rises into the air and fully merges with Scarlet Abyss. It slashes open space and transforms into a massive form, preparing a destruction move. At this time, wind tunnels leading to the control consoles open. Players must quickly decode the device program to interrupt Erosion Bloom Afterimage's skill.
Tips: Split into 2 teams for the two consoles and interact with the devices quickly according to the prompts. Other players should focus on clearing monsters.

Erosion Bloom's Seal: The Erosion Bloom Afterimage targets players, dealing heavy DMG and leaving behind Slasher Echoes.
Tips: Try to place the Slasher Echoes around the ring-shaped arena, spaced apart but still relatively grouped.

Arc Slash: Erosion Bloom Afterimage sweeps its sword across one-quarter of the field, destroying all Slasher Echoes in its path. Any Echo erased will explode, releasing energy that inflicts a short but heavy bleed-over-time debuff on all players and leaves DoT zones.
Tips: Guardians must guide the boss to face the direction where the sweep will begin. Healers must maintain team HP and activate DMG-Resistance skills when needed. In Nightmare Mode, a phantom sweep will occur simultaneously, requiring careful positioning from the team.

Judgment of Shared Sin: Erosion Bloom Afterimage charges its greatsword and deals heavy shared DMG to the frontal area. If too few players share the hit, the entire field will take massive DMG.
Tips: This attack comes right after Arc Slash. Make sure another party is ready to take the share. In Hard Mode and above, sharing triggers an extra explosion. Try to minimize the number of players sharing while ensuring enough are present to survive. In Nightmare Mode, a phantom shared DMG will appear simultaneously, requiring players to split into two groups.

Lotus Dance: Erosion Bloom Afterimage plunges its sword into the ground, triggering magma surges across the field and detonating all Slasher Echoes. Destroyed Swordshades cause violent raid-wide explosions, inflicting a short but heavy bleed-over-time debuff and leaving DoT zones.
Tips: Use Arc Slash to clear Slasher Echoes whenever possible. If Lotus Dance will destroy them instead, activate DMG Reduction skills in advance.

Mind Wrack: On Hard and above, the Erosion Bloom Afterimage gathers energy. All players facing it will have their minds briefly stripped, becoming unable to move or cast skills.
Tips: Stand with your back to the Boss.

Corroding Seed: In Hard Mode and above, the Erosion Bloom Afterimage plants Corroding Seeds. After a long incubation period, they bloom, spreading Corroding Seed energy across the arena, reducing players' ATK and Max HP. Corroding Seeds can only be destroyed by Arc Slash.
Strategy: Place the Erosion Bloom's Seal together with the Corroding Seed and use Arc Slash to destroy it. In Nightmare Mode, two Corroding Seeds are summoned simultaneously and must be destroyed together.

4508.Title: Dreambloom Ruins - Caprahorn - Bloom & Steel - Hard
Content:
King's Shelter: When King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike are within 8m of each other, they shelter one another, gaining 90% DMG Reduction.
Tips: The two tanks should position King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike within their respective areas.

Judgment Hour - Hard: King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike enter a duel of judgment. Each leaps back to their own territory before charging at the other. During this time, players can cast their vote for the king they support by standing in the center of the corresponding territory. The king with the majority of votes will deal a percentage of the opponent's Max HP as damage and seize one of the opponent's territories. Players who don't vote will take damage over time for 10 seconds. The king with a territory advantage gains increased Attack SPD while in their own territory.
Tips: Pre-assign voting positions and plan the number of voters to support the king with lower HP to balance the fight. If the group cannot be split evenly, tanks should abstain from voting to absorb damage.

Territorial Purge: King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike will each mark a territory, which will inflict shared damage. If no player absorbs the damage, the territory will be , dealing massive damage to all players that lessens with distance.
Tips: 5 players should respond to the alert and move to the designated territories to absorb the damage.

4509.Title: Dreambloom Ruins - Caprahorn - Bloom & Steel - Nightmare
Content:
Solunar Annihilation: King of Radiance - Sunfire and King of Azure - Moonstrike join forces to repel intruders. After a brief charge-up, a Solunar Entanglement is created, linking individually to all players and generating a large AoE DMG across the arena, leaving only the center safe. Targeted players then share the DMG. The Solunar Entanglement will knock back all players when it explodes.
Tips: Group up to avoid AoE DMG. Share DMG with players of the same color, then observe the color of your tether and position yourself to be knocked back in the opposite direction.

4510.Title: Floating Island - Dragon Shackles Guide
Content: Gameplay Activated
Floating Island - Dragon Shackles can be challenged in a party. Once the party is formed, the leader must initiate the challenge.
Rewards
Each boss in Floating Island - Dragon Shackles may grant one reward per week. Reward Limits reset weekly and do not stack.
Dynamic Difficulty
Floating Island - Dragon Shackles dynamically adjusts its difficulty based on the party size. When the number of players decreases, the difficulty is lowered accordingly.

4601.Title: Slumberdream Valley
Content:
By defeating enemies in Slumberdream Valley, adventurers can collect a special resource, [Slumberdream Remnants], which can be used to purchase items or activate special effects in designated situations. Slumberdream Remnants cannot be taken out of Slumberdream Valley. After defeating the final Boss, Slumbering Scholar, the system will convert any remaining Slumberdream Remnants into rewards that can be carried out.
Completing high-difficulty challenges also grants a certain amount of [Slumberdream Crystals], which can be exchanged for various progression items in the Slumberdream Store.
Completing related quests grants [Slumberdream Feathers], which can be exchanged for various cosmetic rewards in the Slumberdream Store.

Slumberdream Valley consists of five progressively leveled areas. While inside an area, adventurers continuously accumulate [Slumberdream Value]. Higher-level areas cause Slumberdream Value to accumulate more rapidly. When Slumberdream Value reaches 100%, the adventurer enters the [Slumberdream] state, becoming unable to fight or interact with the environment.
Each area contains a unique regional event. Completing the event activates that area's [Dream Separator], which adventurers can interact with to trigger special effects.
Rescue Ally: Spend Slumberdream Remnants to waken a nearby ally trapped in the "Slumberdream".
Awaken from Dreamscape: Instantly teleports the entire team to the final Boss to begin the final battle. The higher the area level where the final battle is triggered, the stronger the Boss—and the greater the rewards.

Adventurers can obtain unique buffs and enhancements by using items such as [Slumberdream Masks], [Slumberdream Charms], and [Slumberdream Sigils], further improving their combat experience.
Slumberdream Mask: Before unlocking Illusion, you can equip different types of masks on the Nappo statues in the scene to gain unique buffs and increase the difficulty.
* Multiple masks can be equipped in a single challenge to further increase both difficulty and rewards.
Slumberdream Charm: Carrying a Charm greatly increases the adventurer's Slumberdream Resistance, slows Slumberdream Value accumulation, and boosts ATK, DEF, and HP.
Slumberdream Sigil: When opening chests in Slumberdream Valley, there is a chance to obtain a [Dreamweaver Crystal Cluster]. Using one allows you to choose one of three random Slumberdream Sigils and gain a powerful temporary enhancement.

The [Slumberdream Psychoscope] is a unique progression system that provides feature-wide buffs effective only within the Slumberdream Valley. By inserting [Rhapsody Factors] into the Psychoscope, powerful class-specific boosts can also be granted.
* Rhapsody Factors can be purchased from the Slumberdream Store.
The Slumberdream Psychoscope allows multiple preset plans. After a plan is saved, adventurers can select and activate it via the "Switch Plan" button in the lower-left corner.

4511.Title: Dreambloom Ruins - Overview
Content: Gameplay activated

4521.Title: Slumberdream Valley - Overview
Content: Gameplay activated
The Slumberdream Valley holds both opportunity and danger. It can be explored solo or with a party of 1–5 players. When in a party, only the captain can start the challenge.
Reward Rules

The Slumberdream Valley is divided into multiple areas. Rewards are distributed after defeating a boss in any area. Boss strength varies by area, and failing a challenge yields no loot, so proceed with caution.
Challenging bosses in the Slumberdream Valley grants Slumber Crystals. Each boss grants a different number of crystals per attempt. There is a weekly drop limit for Slumberdream Crystals: initially 50 per week, increasing to 80 after unlocking Hard difficulty, and to 120 after unlocking Nightmare difficulty. Reaching the weekly limit in the Slumberdream Valley does not affect crystal acquisition from other sources.
Dynamic Difficulty

The Slumberdream Valley dynamically adjusts its difficulty based on party size. When the number of players decreases, the difficulty is lowered accordingly. The bonds of friendship can overcome anything. So gather your friends and explore together!
Challenge Entry

During the Slumberdream Valley challenge, players can unlock and obtain Slumberdream Mask items. Once unlocked in the Archive, placing a Slumberdream Mask on Nappo during a stage will trigger certain stage anomalies.
Guild Buffs
During the Slumberdream Valley challenge, you can obtain Slumberdream Charms. Activating it in the Archive will provide powerful blessings during the challenge.

5001.Title: Terra Resonance
Content:
Select any Resonance Skill and drag it into an available slot to equip it.
A button for the equipped Resonance Skill will appear on the main interface. You can equip up to 2 Resonance Skills at once.
